attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
TRANSACTION_TYPE              ,
RPO_FLG                       ,
UNBILLED_REVENUE_AMT          ,
PROCESSED_FISCAL_MTH          ,
FISCAL_MTH                    ,
SRC_ENTITY                    ,
SALES_TERRITORY_KEY           ,
PRODUCT_KEY                   ,
SALES_ORDER_KEY               ,
SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY          ,
WEB_ORDER_ID                  ,
BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY          ,
SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY          ,
SOLD_TO_CUST_ACCT_KEY         ,
END_CUSTOMER_KEY              ,
SERVICE_FLG                   ,
CORP_FLG                      ,
CONTRACT_START_DTM            ,
CONTRACT_END_DTM              ,
CONTRACT_TERM                 ,
CONTRACT_NUM                  ,
ERP_DEAL_ID                   ,
AUTO_RELEASE_DT               ,
FHI_BNI_FLG                   ,
CISCO_BOOKED_DT               ,
ORACLE_BOOK_DTM               ,
PROCESS_DT                    ,
SCHEDULED_SHIP_DT             ,
HOLD_FLG                      ,
EARLY_SHIP_FLG                ,
SHIPPED_NOT_INVOICED_FLG      ,
CUST_RQSTD_SHIPMENT_DT        ,
EDW_CREATE_DTM                ,
EDW_CREATE_USER               ,
EDW_UPDATE_DTM                ,
EDW_UPDATE_USER               ,
ATTRIBUTED_PRODUCT_KEY        ,
DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD             ,
DV_RECURRING_OFFER_CD         ,
DV_TOTAL_SALES_VALUE_AMT      ,
DD_FB_TRXL_CURRENCY_CD        ,
PL_CONVERSION_RATE            ,
DD_FB_SO_LINE_SRC_CREATE_DTM  ,
DD_FB_PROMISED_TO_SHIPMENT_DT ,
DD_FB_SS_CD                   ,
SUBSCRIPTION_LINE_TSV_KEY     ,
SUBSCRIPTION_REF_ID           ,
BK_EXAAS_SUBSCR_NUM           ,
SUBSCRIPTION_STATUS_CD        ,
INITIAL_TERM_MTHS_CNT         ,
RENEWAL_TERM_MTHS_CNT         ,
PREPAID_TERM_MTHS_CNT         ,
RENEWAL_CNT                   ,
BILLED_DAY_OF_THE_MTH_INT     ,
OFFER_TYPE_CD                 ,
BILLING_MODEL_NAME            ,
SUBSCR_LINE_STATUS_CD         ,
SALES_ORDER_TYPE_CD           ,
SRC_CANCEL_DTM                ,
CHARGE_TYPE_CD                ,
ATO_NAME                      ,
DV_PROJECTED_CONTRACT_START_DT,
DV_PROJECTED_CONTRACT_END_DT  ,
DV_CONTRACT_HEADER_START_DT   ,
DV_CONTRACT_HEADER_END_DT     ,
ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME          ,
DV_AR_ACCOUNTING_TERM_MTH_INT ,
DV_AVERAGE_TERM_MTH_INT       ,
DV_AUTO_RELEASE_DT            ,
DV_WATERFALL_START_DT         ,
DV_WATERFALL_END_DT           ,
DV_WATERFALL_TERM_DAYS_INT    ,
DV_REM_UNBILLED_REVENUE_AMT   ,
DV_ACTIVE_FLG                 ,
DV_BILLING_CYCLE_ID           ,
DV_PREDICTED_MONTH_BILL_DT    ,
DV_REM_TERM_MONTHS_CNT        ,
CHANNEL_BOOKINGS_FLG          ,
DV_PRDT_ALLCTN_CLSFCTN_CD     ,
DV_MILESTONE_START_DT         ,
DV_MILESTONE_END_DT           ,
DV_ORDER_QUANTITY             ,
DV_COMP_US_LIST_PRICE_AMOUNT  ,
DV_ATTRIBUTION_PCT            ,
DV_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT       ,
'I' AS INSERT_UPDATE_FLAG ,
DV_CX_PRODUCT,
PERIODIC_BILLING_START_DT,
PERIODIC_BILLING_END_DT,
DV_ATO_PRODUCT_KEY,
DV_RPO_ACTIVE_FLG
FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.MT_UNBILLED_REVENUE UNB
WHERE PROCESSED_FISCAL_MTH IN (SELECT DISTINCT FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT FROM $$STGDB.WI_UNBILLED_RSTD_MTH_CTRL
WHERE TRANSACTION_TYPE IN ('NET_ADJ_ERP','ERP'))
AND UNB.TRANSACTION_TYPE IN ('NET_ADJ_ERP','ERP','ERP_ACCRUALS') /*FLEXI*/
